# $${\color{lightgreen}Wamski}$$
Hi there 👋  
My name is $${\color{lightgreen}Jon \space Wasky}$$, and I am majoring in Computer Science at Wright State University. I am passionate about learning new languages and tools to better develop a solution.

## Projects

<img align="right" alt="MAKOS" width=45% src="/Images/MAKOS.png">

### $${\color{lightgreen}MAKOS}$$

[![Status](https://img.shields.io/badge/Status-Getting_Started-red?style=for-the-badge)]()

**MAKOS** is a full-stack, distributed messaging and VOIP platform designed for complete user sovereignty. Leveraging a React and
Typescript frontend for a fluid UI and a Rust backend for safety and performance.

[![Rust](https://img.shields.io/badge/Rust-555555.svg?style=for-the-badge&logo=rust)]()
[![TS](https://img.shields.io/badge/Typescript-555555.svg?style=for-the-badge&logo=typescript)]()
[![React](https://img.shields.io/badge/React-555555.svg?style=for-the-badge&logo=react)]()
[![Vite](https://img.shields.io/badge/Vite-555555.svg?style=for-the-badge&logo=vite)]()

---

<img align="right" alt="Packed" width=45% src="/Images/Packed.png">

### $${\color{lightgreen}PACKED}$$

[![Status](https://img.shields.io/badge/Status-Complete-light_green?style=for-the-badge)]()

**Packed** is a full-stack, distributed resource monitor designed to combine system metrics from 
multiple machines into a single, unified dashboard. Packed provides a high-level overview of your entire infrastructure's 
health regardless of each machine's OS.

<br>

[![Rust](https://img.shields.io/badge/Rust-555555.svg?style=for-the-badge&logo=rust)]()
[![TS](https://img.shields.io/badge/Typescript-555555.svg?style=for-the-badge&logo=typescript)]()
[![React](https://img.shields.io/badge/React-555555.svg?style=for-the-badge&logo=react)]()
[![Vite](https://img.shields.io/badge/Vite-555555.svg?style=for-the-badge&logo=vite)]()

[![Repo](https://img.shields.io/badge/github-repo-blue?logo=github)](https://github.com/Wamski/Packed)

---

<img align="right" alt="TZ-Bot" width=45% src="/Images/TZ-Bot.png">

### $${\color{lightgreen}Timezone \space Bot}$$

[![Status](https://img.shields.io/badge/Status-Complete-light_green?style=for-the-badge)]()

**Timzone Bot** automates the conversion of natural language time references into universal formats. Utilizing a user-defined 
timezone database, it processes incoming messages and generates dynamic Discord timestamps.

[![Python](https://img.shields.io/badge/Python-555555.svg?style=for-the-badge&logo=python)]()

[![Repo](https://img.shields.io/badge/github-repo-blue?logo=github)](https://github.com/Wamski/Timezone-Bot)
